star_1.text: about a week ago I decided to spend money on in-app purchases to get gems to upgrade my ship and parts. the game has crashed and become unplayable. the parts will not apply the upgrades. the "technical service" team has said the only thing that can be done is to uninstall and reinstall the game. I have done this dozens of times with the same outcome. They will not refund my in-app purchases. What a waste of time and money. edit: this game F'ing bucks! I would rate 0 stars if possible.

do not download. game is full of glitches, forced downloads, ads that make you open up a new window, and above all else, you could spend thousands and have nothing to show for it. you cannot even pay to win in this game. servers always down adding that i have had valuable resources, earned, just disappear. i have had turns used, without playing. Their response is to screen record the entire time your are playing, so you can show them the issues, that they are well aware the game has already.

DO NOT RECOMMEND!!! ads are ruining this game for me. Every time I watch an ad for stuff or to continue playing after dying it makes me watch the ad and forces me to go to the app store and when I go back to the game it completely restarts the game essentially erasing whatever progress or level I was on. This game is garbage and I definitely don't recommend downloading it, it's a waste of time.

This game was fun in the beginning, but there are too many currencies and upgrades to deal with. I just want to fly around, dodge bullets, and blow stuff up. I don't want to manage a zillion coin, gem, energy, puzzle piece, and whatever else currencies that hold me back from playing. Too much currency farming and mindless upgrading and not enough game play. Fun for the short time I played, but uninstalled.

Game itself is fun, but the developers are practically shameless in making it impossible to progress through the levels without purchases. Wouldn't mind the endless ad watching so much, but require hundreds of gems to make any upgrades, and game only gives a few at a time. Number of cards required to evolve ship just doubled in last upgrade. Could have hooked me, but went too far. So I'll enjoy the game as much as I can and then move on because it's not worth trying to keep up w moving targets.

I was having fun with this game until... I paid for it. after that, it restarted my whole game, emptied my squad, the ship I paid for was gone, my gems and gold were all gone. $3 to tank the game. pretty lame, I thought it was kind of a fun idea. too bad, really. might've spent more on it even just to even out a squad instead of 1 ship carrying the squad. Not my loss, I guess.

Don't waste your time and money. One spends all this money to buy and merge ships and then you get a garbage of a new ship as a result, that can't even kill the enemy. Whoever created this game only had money making in mind not fun. And the enemy is basically immortal, so that one has to keep watching adds and spending in it. This is just an adds and money making game, I have watched over 5000 adds and my ships still aren't strong enough. It is not worth the effort, there is no fun in that.

It's fun, but it's all about getting your S.MONEY!! I waited some time (2 weeks everyday) to see what this game was about. You can make it to level 30 easy. But after 40 on easy, it gets hard. Not to mention normal and harrd settings. They are ridiculous. By level 50, you NEED to pay. Then, at level 1,000, you teleport and pay more money. The ads are for everything. And the bosses are demonic and scary. Deleted, not again. DO NOT RECOMMEND!!! Play something else.

This app just got deleted. Too many glitches. For one, the game keeps demoting me and taking away my earned coins. There is no provision for either of these to happen. Then at a certain level it won't let me shoot anymore, although continual shooting is part of the game. I get so frustrated at having earned ranks and coins just to have them taken away for no reason. Also, ads are part of apps, but this game makes you watch an ad to earn anything. Fun game; not worth the frustration. I'm OUT!

Started out fun. By the third level you can no longer effectively play this game. The cost of upgrades to make your ships competitive becomes so great you can't perform them. The costs go up per level but the rewards completing challenges remains the same as when you started level 1. Ridiculous!!!! Naturally, they want you to spend hundreds of your actual hard earned money from the real world to continue to play this game. Not worth it.

I'll get straight to the point. Difficulty scaling makes you purchase gems or watch ads for for a living to progress. Becomes mundane quickly and the only way to save your progress if you switch devices, they force you to link to Facebook, and that barely works. And if it messes up, you're screwed and have to start over. Which really isn't worth it.

Don't waste your time on this game! It is fun to play and I invested alot of time to develop a strong set of ships, only to find the ability to upgrade ships become exceedingly difficult. I spent money on upgrades only to find there is an endless set of increasing difficulties. The developers rubbed salt in my wounds by changing the rules mid gaming by reducing upgrades and currency payout further. What a underhanded move to sell something to your clients, only to take some away down the road.

This game used to be a good one a while ago. Now its is almost worthless. 1) To upgrade the ships you can only use 500+ gems. Gems can only be purchased or watching 5 adds. What is the purpose to collect coins if you can no longer buy gems with coins? There is not much you can do with coins. 2) can only play 10 times because the energy decreases 10% eveytime you fail or pass the quests. If you want to continue playing purchase of more energy with gems is required.

You can only go so far without spending real money. Once you get to that point, they lag you during the game. This way you get fed up with it and pay money to advance. And the multiplayer is joke. You will get defeated every single game unless you pay money. Also, they show the old arcade game called Galaga, just to get you to download the game. There is no such game on it. I thought it would have been a side game if completed levels to a certain point. Nope. Nothing.

Was great, but latest update ruined a very fun game. Game crashes more often than not, and all the best perks were taken away. Terrible, terrible revision to what was a very fun game. Am now seeing you can only purchase an item once with stars in adventure mode.... Another terrible revisions. If I could revert the game to the previous version I would. Way, way more fun that way.

As much as I like this game I cannot give it more than one star. I have levels that I just absolutely cannot beat. And I am definitely not gonna pay for anything on this after reading a lot of the other comments. But with that said I do still like the game but the difficulty level makes it suck. Have to add NO WAY A 4.7 RAITING FOR THIS GAME IS REAL!!!! Also have to add there's just too much going on way too much going on A little more simplicity would be better

Another Pay or be Prey game, that allows higher player to lose on purpose and prey on the weak. Adverts avg over 30 sec. Very hard to progress after two weeks of play. Could be a game worth spending some money on, but not at the prices this developer charges to play! *Played for 2 months, you peak at about a month, then very minimal progress without spending money! Done with being beat up by Pay to Win players!!!

Fun at first but it becomes too money hungry with the constant "BUY NOW" offers. Only positive I can give the game is watching ads is entirely optional. Getting the Relief Box is near impossible despite watching all the ads needed. Game just doesn't give them to you. Edit: Devs responded and as expected they gave me a useless response. If you actually care devs, actually read my review and you'll see what's wrong with this game.

Several issues. For starters, I've played this game for the last few months, earning several ships, drones, etc. All of the sudden I try this offerwall app that is linked from this game to earn more diamonds, and not only did I not get any diamonds, but the support team keeps pushing me back to the offerwall group, but there is no way to contact them. 2nd, after trying the offerwall app, now every time I open this game my squads are all missing and I have to keep putting them back together.

Recently mad a purchase for the, "starter pack." I was charged the three bucks, and never got my in game items. Tried emailing the e-mail in developer contact info. Came back as a bogus email. Be wary, if purchasing anything. Will give 24 hours for resolution, or I'll have my bank reverse the charge. Update: After contacting the company through Facebook, as directed; sent screenshots of my purchase history, from my bank, and Google. They want more. I have contacted my bank. Uninstalling.

star_2.text: At first, I enjoyed this game a lot. Sure, progression was very difficult, but I got places. I tried picking it back up today, and noticed I couldn't link my old account to my new phone through facebook (where it was saved), an account which I had spent nearly a hundred bucks on. Since the customer care isn't helping me any, hoping this will get someone's attention. if I can't get my account back, I don't have a choice but to give a low rating.

the premise of the game is great. the biggest issue is the pop-ups. every time you load the game, there are eight or more pop-ups. every one has a different x you have to click. and often when you finish a round, this series of popups happens again. it is so frustrating. I can understand one pop-up but this is so beyond comprehension. the game it's pretty good. there's lots like this. I've played a bunch of them. they've done a nice job with an old style of game.

I'm rewriting this to be fair. This game is free to play and doesn't make you watch ads. BUT, very quickly, you are forced to pay money to get more lives(revives). They make it seem as if you will get more if you "watch this quik video." It's a trick. Don't bother watching. Fun enough to play for a little while. Just wanted there to be at least 1 real review on here. I know, I know...contact support. What I'm speaking of is by design. Nothing to fix. Can't complain too much when it's free-ish

Outside of spending money, there's no reasonable way to farm and stack coins/gems. Additionally, there are just too many options to the point that the game constantly glitches. Developers need to find a way to introduce new content, without comprising gameplay. Additionally, there is no option to sell ships, drones, or stones to receive gems/coins back. Selling of items is pretty standard in all other games...

Game is very fun, but the developers are insanely greedy. When ever your outside of a run, there's 500 ways they're trying to get your money, seems very hard to play for long without spending a good chunk of change. I really don't mind putting some money into a game, ppl need to get paid for their work providing fun games, but it's just way too expensive. You have to spend a lot to get a little. There's some ways to watch ads in lieu of cash, but it can be 80 ads to unlock one ship!

Started out as an enjoyable game... then they updated it, making the difficulty almost impossible. The easy levels have become very hard.... you have to shoot the enemy over and over and over. Only way to advance is to upgrade ships, which you'll have to pay for. It's a catch 22.... you can earn a bunch of gems to upgrade your ship, but to earn them you'll have complete missions, which is nearly impossible because your ship isn't upgraded enough.

Repetitive game play. No feel of progression. The bosses just have bigger health pools, but it's not like you destroy parts of a big boss progressively. The game is also just overly complex with all the upgrade choices that basically all do the same thing anyway. This game had potential, but they missed all the parts that make this style game interesting.

After making to about stage 60, I quickly realized how pointless it was trying to progress any further. The bugs, as well as the bosses, started getting insanely difficult to deal with. To the point that I soon realized, to literally get any further, you would need to start spending real money. Well, no can do. And to get rid of the ads, you would also need to SUBSCRIBE to the game, seriously😂? But yeah, good game. However, as with anything fueled by greed, it quickly started becoming stale.

The game is, by all means, good looking and great to play, but the progression is unever and really does suck. I put at least $10 into this game and still haven't gotten anywhere. If you want to play, you have to be prepared for a downright unfair grind, improper translations, and plenty of insane numbers on everything but your damage output and obtained materials.

Less of a "Space Shooter", more of and "Ad Watcher". The game is fine, nice graphics, smooth game play, but you're going to spend WAY more time watching ads than actually playing. In some ways, this is okay, as the ads vary a little more than the actual gameplay which can get a little repetitive. Lots of micro-transactions, too (and some not-so-micro). I would not recommend this game.

The game play ia fine and actually fun. The game has several bugs though. I cannot watch ads to unlock. I watched 10 ads a week ago and tried to watch more yesterday and today and both days told me 'ad refresh tomorrow' even though I never watched am ad those days. Also, when trying to collect quest complletion rewards as well as any earned rewards, I get 'no server connection' even though I'm still being asked to purchase product, so clearly, there is a connection. Needs A LOT of work.

It's ok. It's kind of a cash crab. 1 one you have to be a guild to do a event. If not you can make one but it will cost you. You can get stuff from missions and other things but wait you need that same stuff to upgrade your ship and stuff. You see where this is going. If I'm going to play a game I want to feel like I'm helping or getting stuff that won't last 2 seconds then poof gone. Like skins for the ship. Not a upgrade yes you can use it to get a ship and things but wait it's 10-500 i seen.

Love the game, but developers are greedy. If you watch every ad available each day, you will literally spend 20-30 minutes on ads alone. They offer so many ways to over spend real money for not much reward. It will take a very long time, months or years and likely hundreds of dollars to get a high ranking ship. I have been stuck at the same adventure mode level for weeks. My ships are too weak to pass the level. There are cheats out there, but I do not trust them, so I will not partake.

Really enjoying the gameplay but hit a nasty bug. Trying to pull boxes for the first time and it pulls up the "select the card you want", so I pick one and click accept but then it just closes the page and doesn't save it. So I can't pull any new cards :( Will happily move rating to 5 stars if this is fixed.

I originally put 5 stars, because the gameplay is really fun and it's like a game I used to play on PC when I was growing up. I changed my rating to 2 stars because the number of ADS to get anything done is absolutely obnoxious, ridiculous, lame, horrible, maddening, frustrating, F'ed up, crippling, toxic, putrid, nauseating, cancerous, septic, infected, worthless...... the developers seem to be greedy, and don't seem to care that they'll lose revenue by chasing players away.
What the hell happened?! I updated the app, now nothing works! I All my preset formations are blank and I can't add them back. Plus, I went into the upgrade menu on one, and can't close it!!!

This game is like ADHD got drunk, did a truckload of molly, and then ate an entire salad of magic mushrooms. There are no rules or guides, anywhere. Well, there might be, but first you have to wade thru the 6.02x10^23 clickable buttons. EVERYTHING is a button. There seems to be about 70 modes of play, 500 forms of currency (e.g. Coins, Cards, OTHER Cards, Batteries, OTHER Batteries, and Gems) And the actual battles are VERY likely to induce seizures in a significant portion of the population.
Pretty fun but having the "pay to play" feature takes the "funness" away. Once you run out of "batteries", you have to buy more gems to play.

no solid help in support over account issue. I accidentally merged my new account with my older account, I had 38k odd gems and many coins and upgraded ships, now? all gone, now its the old account with 8k gems, asked for help, oh send one screenshot with your id for recovery, for only 1 purchase? no, you were NO help in recovering that account, money wasted, thanks for nothing
Fun enough to play, but crashes consistently before issuing ad- based rewards, without which you either suffer very slow game progress or force this game into pay-to-play territory

star_3.text: Well, I'm 90% sure that my game is bugged. can't open boxes, squads got reset, I'm stuck with red dots saying that things are new, even though there's nothing there. overall, the gameplay is good. I like that the game doesn't suddenly jump up in difficulty, it's VERY smooth and haven't noticed any frame drops. would give 5 stars, but the game needs to get patched first.

Fun ship design, graphical effects are a definite positive, and there are many forms of meta-progression. Level and enemy design isn't exactly new, but it's not bad. Unfortunately, the game is rotted through from all the ads. They aren't "necessary" to progress, but they punish you for skipping them and there are hundreds available PER DAY. Lots of glitchy ones that get stuck and never reward you, too. The necrosis is too deep at this point. No choice but to amputate. Go elsewhere.

It's fun at the beginning, but progress is slow to get more powerful ships. Lots of ads to watch to gain upgrades, gems, etc. I still like playing as I still want to get 1-2 tier 3 ships. Also to update the game you sometimes have to uninstall and reinstall again. Update: in response to your response, no I will not give you more stars. Fewer stars should motivate you to do better. Earn it, not beg for it.

Talk about a grind. Only 2 gems per level and everything takes at least 20 to 100 gems up to thousands of gems (why not just make them cost actual dollars at this point?!?!). If you want to watch adds don't worry there are plenty. Also you have to grind the parts for the new item or aircraft as well. Or you can download a different game and spend countless hours to get to level 100 in the other game to then earn gems for this game... What?? I did like the old school graphics.

it's a cool little game, just very confusing with how leveling up the spacecraft which makes me not even want to mess with any of that so I just basically play the game as is trying not to get hit cause one single hit kills you. There should be a health bar that allows multiple damage to be taken.

It's a well made shooter, but the prompts to pay for upgrades are constant. I have to click through 4 different offers just to play. There are ads you can watch to get free upgrades but these require watching anything from from 1 to 50 ads. Yes, 50, you read that right.

gameplay is fun, but only 3 stars because I have to restart the game after each level! otherwise it just loads, unacceptable update: you tell me to contact in game support, yet I cannot because it won't let me connect to it.
using the free version done daily we all got to level 25 or so and it won't load non of my ships. and it's fairly hard to figure out as a beginner. to many things you need to buy to succeed.

so the game is fine...not as fun as it used to be...but its ok. my review is lower right now because when I had a problem that was a glitch in one of the Guild wars,they didnt rectify the problem and update the score the way they should have.
it's ok, but it losses internet often so you have to watch the same ads multiple times. I got to level 85 then uninstalled. I didn't want to watch too many ads unnecessarily

Always love Galaxiga, since the first one for Atari 2500 i think it was. This one is real fun too and not rage inducing like some others i played like on youtube lol. I edited my review due to how hard it is to contact support, being forced to use stupid facebook messenger to get help. I don't have facebook nor will i use it.
it's pretty cool but sometimes it doesn't give you the prize sometimes when you watch the ad's it doesn't give me the prizes for when you watch the ad's ‼️

It's not bad. Pretty fun initially anyway. But don't assume it's a game purely reliant on skill like the old arcade games. Instead, progress is tightly/sneakily controlled by the Devs. Some levels have hard full screen width barriers no way to dodge that the only way you can progress is shooting them down in time. And because enemy hp gets progressively higher it basically means you need to grind to lvl up. And we know what that means. Lots of time and/or ads/money. You take your choice.
Game is great but I can't update. Why? Now it's frozen, you didn't fix anything, still frozen
The game has some hikups, take to long from page to page to load up. But is inter tanning.

once you get to a certain level you cannot get any better so you waste half of your time or more just watching ads so that you can get points to increase your ship power and most of the time the ship power increase which takes 20 ads or more to increase doesn't actually even help you when you play in the game only at the beginning levels it's a scam for you to spend money. they need to do better in this area it's a fun game for the first hundred levels after that it doesn't matter how talented o
game is fun, the squad boxes are broken, you can't even open them, just loops back to telling you to pick a card then nothing happens
fun but boxes are broken I've got 10 of each and when I select my wish it just goes back to main screen and doesn't summon anything even if I try with gems
Just did an update. told me to uninstall and reinstall the game. lost all of my squads and data. need a fix please.

Updated my rating on 1/16/2025. The Preset is a game changer. Kudos. The glitches and Dev handling of these glitches have a lot to be desired. Mid vs game the OverDrives won't trigger for as much as 45 seconds. These glitches have been going on for months and yet they are treated as if the end user is somehow to blame for what the software is doing. No promise of resolution in sight. Players at my level get max Guild Boss rewards. Others in the guild, do not get even decent rewards.

star_4.text: The game itself is super fun and progresses well with lots of customization. Very enjoyable. Update: After hunting down their e-mail, actual reps did actually handle my issue quickly. I did have another purchase issue later, but wasn't charged. They may have server issues. Old complaint: "I was having a lot of fun with this game, but when I attempted to purchase one of the ships (The Warlock), the game froze. Once I reloaded the game I still didn't have the ship but my card was charged."

Super fun! Not hard at all to get resources, don't have to spend money or watch ads to keep progressing in the game (both do certainly help with getting gems or coins), and the art style is great! A couple complaints though: there's a minor glitch that happens when opening boxes that makes text unreadable (fixed easily by logging out then logging back into the game), and the art for the 400% gems and coins coupon does resemble ai art? It might is be me. Either way doesn't fit this games style.

It's a good game but the only issue is that the enemy's attack is kinda difficult. I don't have a skill issue because there are too many bullets to focus on it would be great if the attacks can be highlighted and always EEGGGGGGGG SHIPS YIPEEe would be cool if the music were more catchy and epic
The game is fine but still some bugs are present and very annoying. Upgrades to the ship not working sometime. Overdrive not working in some fights also.

this is fun and pretty easy, it gets harder and harder as the game goes on giving the game more excitement. when it really gets challenging is level 29, I lost all me gems and I could not seem to beat that one for the longest time. nice game to play when bored, i recommend it.
fun satisfying. only negatives are the adds don't track smoothly at times. and match making can be slow and punishing.
🗣️This game is best for an arcade shooting game❤️. I play this game a lot🫶 but I've a problem🤧,previously,it had a level based world😚 and now no longer there😒.please🙏 come back the world😣.

this game was a lot of fun at first, but it doesn't take long to get maxed out and then have to spend money to advance. the problem is, you can spend 20 bucks on gems and upgrade a ship and be able to advance 5 or 10 more campaign levels but that's IT. I'm at about level 150 easy and three stars up to around 100 but now I'm topped out. I can't advance anymore and to do so I will have to grind for a month or more just to be able to get a little further. so there isn't much fun anymore. I
I'm stuck at level 21 and it's not letting me go any further as well as not letting me download what I need to continue in the game.

Good in small doses, will cost a lot of premium currency to upgrade, but nice for a distraction. Similar to some old r-type or dariusburst (Check Dariusburst chronicle saviors for 1-4player).Note that the stone slot "hocus stone" is better on level 1 with no duration on the bullet shield and can stack in long levels and op in the early game. At lv2 it is about 8 seconds and can't self stack. lv2 can be hit on the first play session if you choose it as the preferred stone in item store. v25.54.
I love the game has lots of rewards but it has some kinks in recieving them but overall it is fun and does have rewards for playing

game is honestly fun but with regards to how it does the in game ads the game has severe connection issues where you play the ad, you'll be takimg a few seconds and when the ad ends it gives you the reward or says "no internet connection" despite having just played the ad.

Game is good, fun experience. Game itself has a lot of bugs, loading issues, etc. Just seems like it has a very weak server. Some bosses have impossible mechanics to dodge so be prepared with multiple ships.

Updating my review. This is a pretty good game. It could use some more documentation about how upgrades and merges work etc. And it seems your progress is tied to a particular game server, so if you change servers for any reason you find yourself back at level 1
I like it its fun yet 1000 levels let's make it easier to level up gear and drone.
too many ads you watch and you don't get rewarded can't get out of the ad without leaving the game
I'm stuck in a level which makes me play the game longer than I should . t live the challenge
really fun but for some people it's just to easy highly recommend if U need something to do
I'd play the game all night if there wasn't an energy limit. Not a fan of that feature at all
Not bad at all. Except there seems to be no easy and obvious way to exit the game.

star_5.text: I really didn't think I would be enjoying this game anywhere near how much fun and rewarding I am actually having on it. It has quick waves within each level but slowly changing it up to keep it exhilarating and keep you focused on trying to just pure annihilation of everything else that comes at you! It really may seem like a simple pixelated game but if you try it then you'll see how exciting and rewarding it really is, it's a blast!!!

Fun, fast paced. Only negative: after watching an ad, and the ad at the end opens the Play Store app separately, when you try to go back to the game to get the prizes, it re-starts. Then the game doesn't count the watch for the extras, which is frustrating. This doesn't happen if the ad opens a window to the Play Store on top of it instead, then everything behaves properly, and the game does not restart.

Truth be told the constant clicking away all the pop ups did get annoying, that said I played up to level 80 in about 10 days without watching a single ad or paying for anything but the progression had slowed dramatically at that point and I decided the additional upgrades were too many days of grinding away to be worth it. Very fun otherwise and lots of dangling carrots which keep you coming back (for awhile anyways.) Thanks for a cool game!

solid experience. doesn't force ads on you and progression is fairly easy, there is a daily limit to how many levels you can play without paying but it's pretty high. also, the just play app is paying me to play this game so I'm pretty content. Ok one bug: sometimes in either single player or multiplayer I will be unable to use abilities, pause the game, or revive when I die. the buttons simply do not respond. I can still otherwise play the level normally. Leaving the app and then returning...

Just started playing, liking it so far. Still learning all the aspects. Kinda of getting the grove of the game from yester years, lol. Lots of different levels, and you can choose the hardness of which you play as well. You won't be bored. The level at which you play will keep you engaged for hours. You can also interact with others.

This game reminds me of an old skool game from back in the 80's outside the entrance to a walmart in my hometown. Galaga and it was a lot like this one. i played for hours tfying beat another players top score. Pretty good game,developer. It's got great graphics and has an easy level for nostalgic old ladies like me.

At first I was concerned about installing the game DND being forced to watch ads and surprised it is free to play and ads are limited. purchases are available and not too pricey if you choose. Free to play, looking forward to seeing future content and any additions the developers come up .

I haven't enjoyed something like this in a long time. Playing the game is enjoyable, but the part where you can build your own ships. I love it. It's so multifaceted and I'm learning new things that I can upgrade and how it works makes it very enjoyable.There's so much there that'll take me forever to get bored of it.There's always something to work for

this game has so many visual features. the weapons and ships are so tight! im enjoying testing out all the ships and their skills! Download of you want challenging, visually satisfying, hours upon hours of gameplay.

ive been playing this game for 7 years i love it but my complaints r it cost a lot of money and there r way to many ad's and when something happens in the game like I was upgrading my ship and its a lot of work to do this and every time I upgraded it took my coins but I didnt get the upgrade and I contacted customer support but as usual they did nothing its very frustrating and disappointing that ive spent a lot of money in the game but I dont get support from customer support ?????????

Gameplay design and "funability factor", 5 Stars! LOTS of cool ships and ENDLESS attachment combinations, but a helluva resource sink, phew! There's a few things I have issue with but I ain't gonna put em on blast. They're tryna help me as I write this review 😄 They respond QUICK AS HECK YALL! JEEZ! Awesome job y'all 👌

issue was resolved now just waiting for purchases to go through so put rate up now that I can play I'm sure I'll get my purchases at some point so just leave the rating for now only issue I'm having is the 2 purchases I made being credited tried customer care and no response email keeps sending me to that review seems be only respons I'm getting at the moment please help

Really really fun game and I don't have to be bothered by millions of ads like other games do! Would really recommend it to retro gamers! I'm not really a retro gamer, but this changed my perspective of retro gaming! Keep up the good work!

good customer support. got a new phone. for some reason it gave me a new account and I had spent loads of money. they've helped me sort through the problem and port my account over to my new phone. it took about 5 minutes. good guys.
I love this version. it seems to be a great upgrade to the original galaxiga game. no constant invasive ads that other games have...so far...fingers are crossed. good luck friends.

as of this rating I have not ran into an ad and I'm several levels in. it keeps moving at a good speed and its enjoyable. I would recommend it. it's fun sometimes just to blow stuff up. it'll kill some time if your needing to

I have always loved this game. I played it when in the arcades. I just started playing this one so I'm not sure what you can really do yet. I'll update if any problems come up, but so far it's fun and I really think you'll enjoy it

one of my all time favorite games so far I encourage the team to keep up the good work and to please keep improving this game too NVR ending lol and getting better and better everyday it's so much fun I'd encourage anyone and everyone to play this game
The screen fills with ships and you never miss a single target, and there's upgrading easily.
I love this arcade era rules all out for ya would love more faster level ups I cleared level 1- ,22 without a hicUp only to to join the guild 😩 and d find my puny guy is a baby prototype
